transcript.text:
Wow, this is...
I don't think I can finish it
[Even Tzuyang is surprised]
[Listed as Forbe's #1 Korean's rice thief]
[Kimchi Stew]
[Filled to the brim]
About 1.8kgs of meat
1.8kgs of meat!?
[It's just never-ending]
[6 servings of kimchi stew]
[Finished?]
Hello everyone
I'm here in the city of Cheonan today
There's a famous kimchi stew restaurant here that even the locals approved So I'm here!
There's really nothing here
And then there's this restaurant

Yong Chun Garden
My name is Garden too
It's the same! (Jung Won means Garden in Korean)
I kindly asked them if I can come in during break time to film
I will try to finish before their break time so I'm not a bother to the customers
Let's head in
[A restaurant in the middle of nowhere]
[Yong Chun Garden in Cheonan]
Hello
We were connected together for a reason
The menu... Kimchi stew
Pork belly, gochujang bulgogi
Everything looks so good
Up to how many servings can you fit in 1 pot?
There's 1 that can fit 6 servings
[Up to 6 servings!]

Then I'll take the 6 servings
Will you be okay? Yes, I'll be fine
I really like your outfit
We all wear white here
But you're cooking kimchi stew
It splashes, but we get in the mindset of thinking that it's flower decorations
These are all small little flowers
[Preparing more flowers to splash]
[Kimchi stew]
[Is this really 6 servings?]
Bon appetit Looks good
This is how thick it is
This thick It's a lot of food
I'll try the soup first
[Here's some rice]
Mix it with rice? Thank you

1 hot rice and 1 cold rice
It's spicy, so it goes well with cold rice too Thank you
It's been so long since I had a kimchi stew like this
[How do I describe this flavor?]
I can't really explain the food when it's tasty
It's just delicious
Get some kimchi
It's really been a while since I had a kimchi stew like this
It's not filled with artificial flavoring
Truly a flavor that your mom makes
This needs to be eaten with cold rice
I think it's better with cold rice than hot rice
It's really something my grandmother used to make for me
[The food is not getting smaller]
This is a lot of food even for 6 servings
Put some fishcake on there

Let's get some ham on here too
Everybody says the food portion is too big
Customer: Decrease the portion size!
The other restaurants use smaller ports
Our pots are long vertically
Hot
Is this aged kimchi?
We mix 2 different kinds 1 is fermented for 1.5 years and 1 is 2.5 years
So it's a mix of aged kimchi and fermented kimchi
No wonder it was something like in the middle
Yes, because they are a mix of 1 and 2-year-olds
I already have a lot of food here, but I keep scooping
I'm eating alone, but being greedy
Let's scoop more meat
It's not even close to the bottom yet
Excuse me

Do you have sugar?
I'm actually not really good at eating sour food that well
[Sprinkling on some sugar]
Sprinkle on there as you eat
Delicious
[Normal people can enjoy it without any sugar added]
This is.. It's just amazing
[This can't be 6 servings]
She's good at eating
You eat it deliciously
I want some too now
She probably only weights 40kgs
[Happy]
There's a lot of food in here
I ate about half
I've been focusing on eating the food than the soup

There's more food than the soup itself
Do you see this? Unbelievable amount of food
Other places will consider this as 8-9 servings
Nah, 10 servings for sure at least
[6 servings that look like 10 servings]
Excuse me, can I have some more rice?
[Time for some bibimbap] (Mixed rice)
What time is it?
I can do it in 10 minutes [10 minutes before they open for dinner]
This really fills you up
Filled with memories
I feel like the elders will also enjoy this food
There's not much time left until 5:30pm
Let's get all the meat out first
I wanted to eat something light, so I thought 6 servings wouldn't be a problem
But I think this is well over 12 servings of food

Pick the meat out
There's a lot of meat
I'll to-go the rest
There's 5 minutes left
Excuse me
Can I get this to-go, please?
Right now? Yes, please
Looks good
You always have to finish off the kimchi stew with bibimbap
Everyone argues when they are kids over the meat
But there's no reason to argue because there's so much meat
We use a lot of meat
About 1.8kg of meat
I would assume you guys use 3x more meat
Not 3 times, 3 x 600g
1.8kg of meat?

[Shocked]
It should be called a Meat Stew
It really is
They even use 600g of meat for 2 servings
600g of meat for 8,000 won? (~$7 USD)
1 serving 300g of meat
That's amazing
I was wondering why there was never-ending meat
They put in 1.8kg of it
My time is up 2 minutes late
[They are getting to-go orders as soon as break time is over]
[Finished]
She finished all the meat
She ate a lot I've never seen anyone eat this much
Corn?
Thank you

[Some corns on the house]
Thanks everyone
[She finished the rest at home]
That's heavy [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
